seo.title: DevLeadHunter — Sell websites to local businesses that don't have one
seo.description: DevLeadHunter finds businesses without a website, generates a demo site in their name, reaches out by cold email and deploys the site live on payment. End-to-end prospecting automation.

hero.eyebrow: Automated prospecting · from research to sale
hero.subtitle: DevLeadHunter finds businesses without a website, generates a real demo site in their name, reaches out by email — and puts the site live the day they pay.

story.title: Follow one prospect through the machine.
story.subtitle: From research to payment, everything runs automatically. Here is the full journey, with an example.

act1.description: Pick a trade and a city. The tool scans Google, local directories and OpenStreetMap, discards businesses that already have a website and grabs the contact email.

act2.description: A trade-specific template fills itself with their real data — photos, reviews, opening hours — and becomes a live demo site in their name, for 14 days.

act3.description: A cold email campaign starts: two A/B-tested variants, automatic follow-ups, and one send every 20 minutes to protect your sender reputation.

act4.description: The prospect pays through a Stripe link. Their site goes to production on their domain, they receive the CMS access — and you collect €500.

visual.emailPreview: Hi, I built a demo website for your business. It's already live, take a look…
visual.saleHandover: CMS access handed to the client

proof.title: A real website, not a mockup.
proof.description: Every demo is a complete, fast website connected to a CMS. Your prospect discovers their business already online — that's what closes the sale.
proof.bullet1: Carefully designed trade templates that don't look AI-generated
proof.bullet2: The client edits content, photos and pages in the CMS, no developer needed
proof.bullet3: Live as a demo for 14 days, then removed automatically

campaigns.title: Two emails compete, the best one wins.
campaigns.description: Every campaign sends two A/B-tested email variants and tracks opens and clicks per variant. Silent prospects get automatic follow-ups, and the sending pace protects your domain.
campaigns.bullet1: Two variants tested on every campaign, stats per variant
campaigns.bullet3: One send every 20 minutes, sender reputation preserved
campaigns.bullet4: GDPR unsubscribe link included in every email

card.label: Campaign · Plumbers Lyon
card.variantBSubject: What if clients found you on Google?

behavior.title: Know who to call back first.
behavior.description: DevLeadHunter tracks what each prospect does on their demo and with your emails, computes a hot / warm / cold score, and AI summarizes each prospect's interest. Follow-ups can even adapt to that behavior.
behavior.bullet1: Score combining demo visits and email engagement
behavior.bullet2: AI summary of each prospect's interest

card.label: Prospect behavior
card.name: Martin Plumbing
card.aiSummary: Highly engaged prospect: came back to the demo several times and clicked the quote button. Call back first today.

sale.title: From payment to production, in one click.
sale.description: Send a Stripe payment link with a preview of the site. Once paid: production deploy on the client's domain, demo removed and CMS access handed over — automatically.
sale.bullet1: Stripe payment link with a site preview
sale.bullet3: CMS access handed to the client on sale

card.label: Order no. 1042
card.name: Martin Plumbing
card.step4: CMS access handed to the client

features.title: The whole prospecting job, without the chores.

deliverability.title: Clean sending
deliverability.description: Resend, Gmail or your own domain. GDPR unsubscribe link in every email, automatic anti-spam pacing.

platforms.title: Web, desktop and mobile
platforms.description: A full web app, a Windows / macOS desktop app with auto-updates, and an interface built for the phone.

analytics.title: Dashboard & sales tracking
analytics.description: KPIs, conversion funnel, orders and revenue: steer your whole prospecting at a glance.

security.title: Your data, encrypted
security.description: Email accounts and secrets encrypted at rest, data scoped per user. Your prospecting stays yours.

pricing.title: No subscription. Credits.
pricing.subtitle: Try it with free credits, then pay as you go: credits are spent on searches and email sends.
pricing.roiNote: A single website sold — €500 — pays for years of credits.
pricing.loadError: Pricing can't be loaded right now. Please try again later.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.a1: A complete automation chain: it finds businesses without a website, generates a demo site for them, contacts them by cold email and deploys their site to production when they buy — all from a single tool.
faq.q2: Is the generated site a real, editable website?
faq.a2: Yes. It's not an image: it's a real, fast website connected to a CMS (Storyblok). The client edits content, photos and pages themselves, without a developer.
faq.q3: Which platforms can I use it on?
faq.a3: On the web from any browser, as a native Windows and macOS desktop app, and on mobile thanks to a fully responsive interface. Everything syncs through your account.
faq.a4: You receive free credits on signup. Credits are then spent as you go — searches and emails — and never expire. No subscription; top up whenever you want.
faq.q5: Is it GDPR and anti-spam compliant?
faq.a5: Every email includes an unsubscribe link, sends are limited to one every 20 minutes, and you control your sending domain (Resend, Gmail or your own) to protect your reputation.
faq.q6: Can I try it for free?
faq.a6: Yes. Create an account, receive free credits and test the entire pipeline without a credit card.

finalCta.title: Your next client doesn't have a website yet.
finalCta.subtitle: Create an account, get your free credits and launch your first campaign today.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: DevLeadHunter takes the protection of your data seriously. This page describes, plainly, what we collect and why.

s1.title: Data controller
s1.body: DevLeadHunter is published by Léo Guillaume (Dibodev). For any question about your data: leo{'@'}dibodev.fr.

s2.title: Data we collect
s2.body: Account: email address and password (stored hashed). Usage: the searches, prospects and campaigns you create in the tool. Payment: credit purchases are processed by Stripe — no card number ever reaches our servers.

s3.title: Analytics
s3.body: This site uses Umami, a self-hosted analytics tool with no advertising cookies and no cross-site tracking. Statistics are aggregated and anonymous.

s4.title: Purposes
s4.body: Your data is used only to provide the service: authentication, running your searches and campaigns, billing credits. It is never sold or shared for advertising.

s5.title: Retention
s5.body: Your account data is kept while your account is active, then deleted when the account is closed or upon request.

s6.title: Your rights
s6.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase and port your data. Write to leo{'@'}dibodev.fr — answer within 30 days.

s7.title: Cookies
s7.body: The site only uses technical cookies: login session and language preference. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By creating a DevLeadHunter account, you accept the terms below.

s1.title: Publisher
s1.body: DevLeadHunter is published by Léo Guillaume (Dibodev). Contact: leo{'@'}dibodev.fr.

s2.title: Purpose of the service
s2.body: DevLeadHunter is a prospecting automation tool: finding businesses without a website, generating demo sites, cold email campaigns and sales tracking.

s3.title: Account
s3.body: Signing up requires a valid email address. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for the activity performed from your account.

s4.title: Credits & payment
s4.body: The tool works pay-as-you-go through a credit system, with no subscription. Payments are processed by Stripe. Purchased credits never expire.

s5.title: Responsible use
s5.body: You are solely responsible for the compliance of your campaigns with applicable regulations (GDPR, anti-spam rules): unsubscribe link, respect of recipients and of your sending domain. The tool ships these guardrails; using them properly is on you.

s6.title: Availability & liability
s6.body: The service is provided “as is”, with no guarantee of continuous availability. The publisher's liability is limited to the amount of credits purchased over the last twelve months.

s7.title: Termination
s7.body: You may close your account at any time. The publisher may suspend an account in case of abusive, fraudulent or illegal use of the tool.

s8.title: Governing law
s8.body: These terms are governed by French law.

footer.description: The automation chain that turns businesses without a website into clients: research, site generation, cold email and go-live — end to end.
